option.name: originalContent
option.value:
""" Service module """
from src.api.services.validation.schemas import CreateChatSchema from src.components.chatbot.core import RAGChatbot from src.database.models import ChatSession from src.database.repository.interfaces import ChatSessionRepositoryInterface from src.errors.api_exceptions import ApiException from src.logger.base_logger import BaseLogger
class ChatService: def __init__( self, chatbot: RAGChatbot, chat_session_repo: ChatSessionRepositoryInterface ) -> None: self.chatbot = chatbot self.chat_session_repo = chat_session_repo self._logger = BaseLogger(__name__)
async def create_chat(self, chat_data: CreateChatSchema) -> ChatSession:
created_id = self.chat_session_repo.create( ChatSession( title=chat_data.title, ) )
try: self.chatbot.create_chat( index_chat_id=created_id # TODO: Convert str usage in chatbot to UUID ) except (ApiException, Exception) as e: self._logger.error(f"Error creating chat: {e}") await self.chat_session_repo.delete(session_id=created_id)
# Validate session data # Create a new chat session in the database # Create vector store for chat #
def get_session(self, session_id): # Logic to retrieve a chat session by ID pass
def update_session(self, session_id, session_data): # Logic to update an existing chat session pass
def delete_session(self, session_id): # Logic to delete a chat session pass
def get_chat_messages(self, session_id): # Logic to retrieve messages for a chat session pass

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
""" Service module """
from src.api.services.validation.schemas import CreateChatSchema from src.components.chatbot.core import RAGChatbot from src.database.models import ChatSession from src.database.repository.interfaces import ( ChatSessionRepositoryInterface, DBTransactionFactory, ) from src.errors.api_exceptions import ApiException from src.logger.base_logger import BaseLogger
class ChatService: def __init__( self, chatbot: RAGChatbot, chat_session_repo: ChatSessionRepositoryInterface, tx_factory: DBTransactionFactory, ) -> None: self.chatbot = chatbot self.chat_session_repo = chat_session_repo self.tx_factory = tx_factory self._logger = BaseLogger(__name__)
async def create_chat(self, chat_data: CreateChatSchema) -> ChatSession: try: async with self.tx_factory.create() as tx: session_entity = ChatSession(title=chat_data.title) created_id = await self.chat_session_repo.create( data=session_entity, tx=tx, )
self.chatbot.create_chat( index_chat_id=str(created_id) )
return session_entity except (ApiException, Exception) as e: self._logger.error(f"Error creating chat: {e}") raise
# Validate session data # Create a new chat session in the database # Create vector store for chat #
def get_session(self, session_id): # Logic to retrieve a chat session by ID pass
def update_session(self, session_id, session_data): # Logic to update an existing chat session pass
def delete_session(self, session_id): # Logic to delete a chat session pass
def get_chat_messages(self, session_id): # Logic to retrieve messages for a chat session pass

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
